channel.title: Zeitschrift für Naturforschung A
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Zeitschrift für Naturforschung A

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Behnam Pourhassan, İzzet Sakallı, Şükrü Tüzmen, Xiaoping Shi, Mir Faizal DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zna-2025-frontmatter3

item.title: Mathematical modeling for the potential energy of the aminophenol derivative azomethine molecule via Bezier surfaces and fuzzy inference system
item.description: Article by Behnam Pourhassan, İzzet Sakallı, Şükrü Tüzmen, Xiaoping Shi, Mir Faizal DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zna-2024-0189

item.title: Topological descriptors and connectivity analysis of coronene fractal structures: insights from atom-bond sum-connectivity and Sombor indices
item.description: Article by Behnam Pourhassan, İzzet Sakallı, Şükrü Tüzmen, Xiaoping Shi, Mir Faizal DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zna-2024-0286

item.title: Stability analysis of semi-analytical technique for time-fractional Cauchy reaction-diffusion equations
item.description: Article by Behnam Pourhassan, İzzet Sakallı, Şükrü Tüzmen, Xiaoping Shi, Mir Faizal DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zna-2024-0201

item.title: Dynamics of closed-form invariant solutions and formal Lagrangian approach to a nonlinear model generated by the Jaulent–Miodek hierarchy
item.description: Article by Behnam Pourhassan, İzzet Sakallı, Şükrü Tüzmen, Xiaoping Shi, Mir Faizal DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zna-2024-0257

item.title: Temperature-dependent elastic, mechanical, thermal, and acoustic behavior in alkaline earth semiconductors
item.description: Article by Behnam Pourhassan, İzzet Sakallı, Şükrü Tüzmen, Xiaoping Shi, Mir Faizal DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zna-2024-0244

item.title: Investigation of the effect of Si content on the structural, mechanical, and tribological properties of TiAlN/AlSi protective multilayers
item.description: Article by Behnam Pourhassan, İzzet Sakallı, Şükrü Tüzmen, Xiaoping Shi, Mir Faizal DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zna-2024-0235

item.title: Higher-order corrections on the denaturation of homogeneous DNA thermodynamics
item.description: Article by Behnam Pourhassan, İzzet Sakallı, Şükrü Tüzmen, Xiaoping Shi, Mir Faizal DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zna-2024-0200
